race.comment: THREE ARROWS (2) closed his maiden prep with back-to-back wins and returns from a six-month break. Goes fast so Stapleford should capitalise on the good draw. Recent trial winner who looks ideally placed to pick up where he left off. CAPTIVATING TYCOON (4) found 1000m at Kembla a bit sharp first-up but he did make some late inroads. Draws a much better alley this time and gets to his right trip. Poses a genuine threat. GRAVEL ROAD (5) was returning from a three-month spell and facing the starter for only the second time when unplaced as a $1.75 pop over 1000m at Kembla recently. Cannot be sacked on that run - clearly has a lot more to offer. NEWY (7) finished a fair way off the winner at Coffs Harbour last time. Freshened up and should be thereabouts.
